agent.housing experience: Over the past five years I have rented houses, moved from one apartment to another. However, recently I bought a house. The apartments were congested and it was not easy to find own compound house, hence the decision to buy my own house.

agent.occupation: Natural resources, construction, and maintenance occupations
agent.housing experience: I have experienced several changes in my housing situation due to financial, personal, and employment-related reasons. I initially lived in a rental apartment but had to move when the rent increased beyond what I could afford. I then stayed temporarily with family while I searched for a more affordable option. After securing a steady income, I moved into a new rental unit, where I stayed for a couple of years. Most recently, I had to relocate again due to the property being sold by the owner. Throughout this time, my focus has been on maintaining stable, safe, and affordable housing as circumstances evolved.

agent.occupation: Management, business, science, and arts occupations
agent.housing experience: Over the past five years, I’ve moved a couple of times. I was renting a one-bedroom, but the rent kept going up, so I had to look for something cheaper. I ended up moving to a different neighborhood that wasn’t my first choice, but it was more affordable. Then I moved again to be closer to my job and to get a bit more space. Honestly, each move was mostly about trying to make things work financially and finding a decent place that fit my needs.
